# Security & Support Policy

## Supported Versions

PADZE (Pythonic Allelic Diversity Analyzer) is under active development. Support and fixes are provided for the current release.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.1.0   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting Bugs and Security Concerns

Please report bugs and security concerns via the project's GitHub issue tracker:

https://github.com/Andres42611/PADZE/issues

For sensitive security reports, we ask that you contact the maintainers privately to arrange coordinated disclosure **before** opening a public issue. This gives us time to assess the impact and prepare a fix before details are made public.

When reporting, please include enough detail to reproduce the problem: the PADZE version, your Python version and platform, the command or input that triggered the issue, and the observed versus expected behavior.

## Note

PADZE is research software provided under the MIT license with no warranty of any kind (see `LICENSE`).
